name: large metal room
description: I'm in a large metal room
hints: The engine room! Examine the machinery carefully - it controls the ship's vital systems.
LOOK MACHINERY to see the ship's engines and life support. There is a device here that can be taken.
GET DEVICE to acquire a useful tool. The console may have additional controls. LOOK MACHINE reveals this contains the ship's engines and life support systems.
The device found here is essential for puzzles elsewhere. Study the machinery to understand the ship's power systems.
notes: Engine room with machinery (ship's engines and life support) and a control console. A device can be obtained here (GET DEVICE). The device is a key inventory item needed elsewhere. No listed exits - must find the way back or use the device to create an exit.
